mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_odm_followup ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_odm_followup WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_odm_followup WHERE status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_odm_followup (employee_name, judgment, action_type, action_start_date, followup_exam_date, status, remarks, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{employeeName}, #{judgment}, #{actionType}, #{actionStartDate}, #{followupExamDate}, #{status}, #{remarks}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_odm_followup SET employee_name = #{employeeName}, judgment = #{judgment}, action_type = #{actionType}, action_start_date = #{actionStartDate}, followup_exam_date = #{followupExamDate}, status = #{status}, remarks = #{remarks}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
